title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Go library for running Llama, Mistral, Gemma, CodeLlama and other large language models locally with a single command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate embeddings, pull/create models, list running models, etc.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers to interact with the Ollama REST API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that adds Ollama chat, completion and embeddings as first-class components.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-web/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-like interface) with multi-model chats, code highlighting, RAG, admin panel.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Lightweight Retrieval-Augmented Generation example using Ollama embeddings and Chroma vector store.

title: ollama-chatbot
summary: Minimal React chatbot component that streams responses from a local Ollama server via the JS client.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI for Ollama with conversation history, syntax highlighting and configurable prompts.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into the editor as an inline Copilot alternative.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to generate code, refactor and chat with any Ollama model from within the editor.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official Docker and docker-compose snippets for running Ollama CPU/GPU containers with model persistence.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset that lets you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community-maintained Rust crate providing async/sync bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community C# SDK for .NET 6+ to chat, embed and manage models on an Ollama server.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app + REST endpoints that expose Ollama chat/completions with rate-limiting and token auth for multi-user apps.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat component template that connects to Ollama and demonstrates RAG, speech-to-text and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to summarize notes, generate flashcards and answer questions using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that streams Ollama responses in chat, supports slash commands and per-user model choice.

title: r/ollama – Local LLMs ecosystem discussion
summary: Active subreddit for sharing new models, tools, benchmarks and troubleshooting around the Ollama ecosystem.
